cases.title: provider recovery strategy is actionable
cases.fallback: Run S28-01 and inspect trailing streak plus recommended actions.

cases.title: taxonomy feedback loop remains non-failing
cases.fallback: Recheck S28-02 config and unknown candidate extraction.

cases.title: readiness notify produces message payload
cases.fallback: Run S28-03 with --send after configuring webhook env.

cases.title: triage v2 exports priority actions
cases.fallback: Run S28-04 and verify priority_actions is populated.

cases.title: policy drift guard v2 is non-failing by default
cases.fallback: Run S28-05 with baseline update and inspect drift classification.

cases.title: soak v2 remains actionable
cases.fallback: Run S28-06 and inspect max_consecutive_nonpass + reason_code.

cases.title: readiness notify tracks delivery attempts
cases.fallback: Run S28-03 and verify notification.attempt_count is emitted.

cases.title: reliability soak reports remaining run gap
cases.fallback: Run S28-06 and verify remaining_runs_to_target is emitted.

cases.title: triage pack includes severity buckets
cases.fallback: Run S28-04 and verify alerts_by_severity is emitted.
